content: We can reorient the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) for 2025 autonomous agents to gate long-term memory (LTM) consolidation based on curiosity prediction error, rather than only using ICM to drive exploration. Curiosity prediction error, which indicates how much a novel observation surprises an agent, acts as a natural filtering signal to determine which short-term memory (STM) traces are worth encoding into persistent LTM, rather than filling LTM with trivial, predictable information.
